adminBulkWithdrawDeposits(address[]).details: Call after adminForceCloseAll so totalBorrowed = 0. Absorbs any yield shortfall.

adminClaimAndInjectYield().details: Yield is minted directly into this contract by MockYieldPool.claimYield(),      then flows through _distributeInterest so all lenders earn their pro-rata share.

adminForceClose(address).details: For testnet / demo resets only. Absorbs outstanding debt as a protocol loss.

adminHardReset(address).details: ALL user deposits are sent to `to`. For testnet fresh-start resets only.

adminInvest(uint256).details: Enforces min-buffer: 20% of totalDeposited must remain liquid after invest.

adminPullBack(uint256).details: Yield accumulated in the pool is NOT claimed here - call adminClaimAndInjectYield separately.

params.tick: 0 = disabled (1x normal), N = Nx accelerated. 60 = 1 sec equals 1 min of interest.

adminTickPool(address[]).details: Capitalises accrued interest into the borrower's principal and resets their clock.      This lets lenders see real-time yield growth without waiting for borrower repayments.

accruedInterest(address).notice: View helper: accrued interest for an open position

adminBulkWithdrawDeposits(address[]).notice: Force-withdraw deposits for a batch of lenders without the normal liquidity check.

adminClaimAndInjectYield().notice: Claim yield from pool and distribute it to lenders via accYieldPerShare.

adminForceClose(address).notice: Force-close a position and any pending collateral without debt repayment.

adminForceCloseAll(address[]).notice: Batch force-close positions and return USDC collateral. Absorbs unpaid debt.

adminHardReset(address).notice: Nuclear reset: zero all pool accounting and sweep all USDC to admin.

adminInvest(uint256).notice: Deploy idle capital to the yield pool.

adminPullBack(uint256).notice: Pull principal back from yield pool to this contract.

adminResetUserScore(address).notice: Reset a single user's credit score history.

adminResetUserScores(address[]).notice: Batch-reset credit score history for multiple users.

adminSetGlobalTick(uint256).notice: Set global interest tick multiplier for ALL positions simultaneously.

adminSetYieldPool(address).notice: Wire the yield pool. One-time setup after deploying MockYieldPool.

adminTickPool(address[]).notice: Force-accrue interest for borrowers and immediately distribute it as yield to lenders.

getPositionFull(address).notice: View helper: full position plus accrued interest in one call.

globalTick().notice: Global interest tick multiplier applied to ALL positions (0 = disabled = 1x).

healthRatio(address).notice: View helper: health ratio in basis points; max uint256 if inactive.

pendingStrategyYield().notice: Pending yield sitting in the yield pool waiting to be claimed.

strategyStatus().notice: Full strategy status in one call (for frontend + backend monitor).
